title: Marvell Technology Stock Forecast and Analyst Predictions
text: Marvell Technology is forecast to grow earnings and revenue by 18.5% and 21.3% per annum respectively, with EPS expected to grow by 17.3% per annum. Looking ahead, 2027 revenue forecast increased from US$9.99 billion to US$10.9 billion, with EPS estimate increased from US$1.66 to US$1.95 per share. The consensus among 28 Wall Street analysts is to Strong Buy MRVL stock, with 16 (57.14%) recommending it as a Strong Buy. Bullish analysts highlight that Marvell's accelerating exposure to AI infrastructure, particularly in custom ASICs and high-speed connectivity, is driving upward revisions to both revenue expectations and perceived earnings durability. CEO Matt Murphy stated on the Q4 fiscal 2026 earnings call that the company expects year-over-year revenue growth to accelerate each quarter in fiscal 2027, anchoring the company's fiscal 2027 outlook at approaching $11 billion. The company's fiscal 2028 outlook calls for revenue approaching $15 billion, roughly 40% growth year over year.
